source.title: PDD Holdings Business Model Quality Assessment - Profit Engine vs Investment Engine

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo domestic is the profit engine; Temu international is the investment engine — but TS revenue convergence makes this harder to separate
extractions.evidence: Revenue mix FY2025: OMS RMB 217.8B (50.4%) vs TS RMB 214.1B (49.6%). OMS is primarily Pinduoduo domestic advertising (high margin, ~70%+ gross margin on ad revenue). TS includes both Pinduoduo transaction fees AND Temu's gross revenue (much lower margin due to fulfillment costs). The 23% CoR increase (RMB 188.8B) is substantially driven by Temu fulfillment. PDD does not break out Pinduoduo vs Temu profitability.

verification.verifier_notes: PDD does not provide segment-level profitability. The profit/investment engine distinction is inferred from revenue type characteristics and cost driver disclosures.

extractions.claim: FY2025 gross margin compressed 460bps to 56.3%, but this still exceeds most global e-commerce platforms and reflects marketplace model strength
extractions.evidence: FY2025 gross margin: (431,845.7 - 188,801.8) / 431,845.7 = 56.3%. FY2024: (393,836.1 - 153,900.4) / 393,836.1 = 60.9%. FY2023: ~63%. Compression is primarily Temu fulfillment costs flowing through CoR. For comparison: Amazon gross margin ~48%, Alibaba ~40%, JD ~16%, MercadoLibre ~53%.

verification.verifier_notes: PDD margins calculated from press release. Peer margins from latest public filings.

extractions.claim: Business model quality thesis: PDD earns ~RMB 120B from high-quality sources (OMS ads + interest income) and uses ~RMB 25B+ to subsidize Temu growth
extractions.evidence: High-quality earnings: OMS revenue RMB 217.8B at estimated ~50% operating margin = ~RMB 109B operating contribution. Interest & investment income: RMB 25.6B. Total high-quality earnings ~RMB 134B. Actual consolidated operating profit: RMB 94.6B. Implied Temu + merchant program drag: ~RMB 40B. This suggests Pinduoduo domestic + interest income alone generates ~RMB 134B in operating income, while Temu operations and the 100B merchant program consume ~RMB 40B.

verification.verifier_notes: This is an analytical framework, not disclosed by PDD. OMS margin estimate of 50% is based on comparable pure marketplace ad businesses. Actual Pinduoduo margin may differ.

extractions.claim: Cash generation remains strong despite investment cycle: FY2025 OCF RMB 106.9B, cash pile grew RMB 90.7B YoY to RMB 422.3B
extractions.evidence: FY2025 operating cash flow: RMB 106,938.7M (down from RMB 121,929.3M in FY2024, -12.3%). Cash + ST investments: RMB 422,308.3M at Dec 2025 vs RMB 331,560.0M at Dec 2024, growth of RMB 90.7B (+27.4%). Even during the investment cycle, PDD is accumulating cash at an extraordinary rate.

verification.verifier_notes: Direct from press release balance sheet and cash flow statement
